home.headline: This Week's Schedule & Ongoing Events
home.lead: Make sure to check it out on days you can come visit 🤍

schedule.title: This Week's Stream Schedule
schedule.noteHtml: The 3,000 subscriber celebration stream will be this Saturday at 9 PM!　Let’s have fun with a new outfit reveal and interactive mini games!　If you don’t come, you’re getting banned from the stream 😈　For now, I’ll be focusing on work next week as well,　so let’s meet on stream Friday, Saturday, and Sunday 🤍

about.title: About
about.bodyHtml:
御手洗 遊

Mitarai Asobu

I can be a bit mischievous and pretty playful...
but let's get along, okay?
🦝SpeciesHalf Human, Half Raccoon
🎂Debut & BirthdayJanuary 3rd
⋈Support Mark⋈🦝 (bow tie & raccoon)
💗Fan NameJumyou (Lifespan)
🌅Good MorningOhami-ta
☀️HelloKonmi-ta
🌙Good Work / See YouOtsumi-ta
💵Naisu-pa / NaimenOffering / Kenjou / Jumyou no Kenjou / Subarashiki Jumyou no Kenjou
🎮ActivitiesChatting, Gaming, Drawing
Not Otearai! I'm Mitarai Asobu!
When you're happy, spend time with Asobu
When you're lonely, spend time with Asobu
When you're struggling, spend time with Asobu
Your life plan is decided🖤
Make absolute use of your lifespan🖤
A request 🤍
Please try to avoid using the phrase "Naisu-pa" during my streams!
The reason is that it does not carry the weight of your "lifespan"!

✨ Dreams I Want to Achieve

I'll do my best too, so you do your best too, okay?


🎁 Wish List
Soundproof Room
I've always wanted a Soundproof Room...！
I'd be able to stream at night and record songs and ASMR much more easily 🤍
I'd be so happy if you could support the crowdfunding!
♡ ♡ ♡
Mitarai Asobu
Mitarai Asobu

Ways to Support
Try to conquer them all, starting from the top!
♡ ♡ ♡
It's only natural for Jumyou... right?
⋈ Support through sharing & skills
▼
Spread the word
Please like and share YouTube videos, live streams, and X posts 🤍
In particular, pressing the Share button → Copy button helps boost Asobu's recommendation ranking
Join contests
Coloring contests, illustration contests, clip video contests, and more — let's all get excited together!
➡
Create / post clip videos
Not just during contests — I'd be happy if you post them anytime!
Clip scenes from live streams
Clips appear on the YouTube channel's home screen
Try clipping cute scenes, scary scenes, screaming scenes, all kinds!
Watch stream archives
It boosts the recommendation ranking and increases total watch time, which I really appreciate 🖤

membership.bodyHtml:
Membership
Welcome to the special place for Jumyou
♡ ♡ ♡
Join YouTube Membership to enjoy a variety of perks!
All plans include the perks of lower tiers.
Starting from ¥140/month.
Join now 🤍
Asobu's Deep Mercy
¥140 / A gracious blessing
¥140 / month

Included perks:

  • ⋈Member badge
  • ⋈Custom emoji

You think you're getting perks for ¥140?

Asobu's Cute Little Jumyou
¥490 / Member-exclusive perks

¥490 / month

Included perks:

  • ⋈Member badge
  • ⋈Custom emoji
  • ⋈Members-only chat
  • ⋈Members-only live streams
  • ⋈Members-only videos
  • ⋈Members-only Shorts
  • ⋈Shoutouts to members
Jumyou Alliance
About Jumyou Alliance
Upper-tier plans / Exclusive goods system / Shipping

The Jumyou Alliance is the collective name for YouTube Membership plans at ¥1,990 and above.

🎁
Exclusive Goods
Exclusive goods with no restocks or reprints, gifted irregularly (every 2–6 months)!
Schedule posted members-only; photos first revealed at the unboxing stream.
💳
Member Card
Earn it after 1 full year! A special card with my signature, your name, and an issue number 🤍
📝
Members-only Posts
Goods schedules and personal posts shared exclusively on Discord/YouTube for members! No public announcements.
⋈ Schedule Example
Example: White Day goods — here's what it looks like ↓
January
Announcement &
Shipping request
February
Production
March
Delivery ♡
Unboxing Stream
Photos revealed &
SNS posting unlocked
If you are a member in January and submit a shipping request, you can still receive your goods even if you cancel in February.
The above schedule is only an example. Please check the actual schedule after joining the Jumyou Alliance.
  • ⋈If you do not submit a shipping request, it will be treated as declining the gift.
  • ⋈You only need to cover the BOOTH handling fee and ¥100 shipping.
  • ⋈Each person can receive one free item per round. Additional items can be purchased at cost.
  • ⋈As goods are made-to-order, cancellations and refunds are not accepted.
  • ⋈If you cancel after submitting a shipping request, the goods will still be sent. If you don't want them, please contact us with your order number.
Connected Jumyou
¥1,990 / Jumyou Alliance + Exclusive goods + Posts + X private account

¥1,990 / month
Joining the "Jumyou Alliance"

You'll get access to Jumyou Alliance perks on Discord! Stay for a full year and receive a signed member card! Core perks include exclusive goods, posts, and the X private account described below.

Note: Please follow the guide video to link your Discord account with YouTube. If you don't have a Discord account, please create one.

Post Reading Access

You can read posts and diary entries I write! Daily life, thoughts on new projects, progress reports, and more! I post at least once a month.

Exclusive Goods

Goods gifts are not monthly — they're an irregular perk, available every 2–6 months.
Details are only revealed to Jumyou Alliance members! Check the announcement and submit your shipping request!

Invited to X Private Account!

You can follow the Jumyou Alliance-exclusive X account!
It's not a secret account lol

Past Video Access

You can watch videos and archived streams from before my activity as Mitarai Asobu!

Verified Jumyou
¥2,790 / Lower tier perks + Signed shikishi + Limited-time voice clips

¥2,790 / month
Signed Shikishi

I'll give you a shikishi with a handwritten signature! Each one is different — truly one of a kind 🤍
Delivery timing matches the exclusive goods. A goods reservation is required to receive it.

Limited-Time Voice Clips

I'll post at least one seasonal voice clip per month — morning greetings, good-night messages, and more! The voice data can be downloaded while available. It will be set to private after the period ends.

Linked Jumyou
¥4,690 / Lower tier perks + Private live stream + Digital drawing request

¥4,690 / month
Private Live Stream Just for Two 🤍

Sometimes it's nice to talk one-on-one, right? A chance to share the thoughts and words you've been wanting to give me...... Questions, chats, advice, games, drawing — what do you want to do~? Book a convenient date and time. Please secure at least 15 minutes! I'm looking forward to it.

The archive is private by default, but extreme misconduct may result in it being made public 🖤

Digital Drawing Request

I'll create an illustration as a gift — something you can use as a social media icon or phone wallpaper, a memorable piece just for you!

※Only the requester may use the illustration. I'll draw it during a stream! Subject can be your favourite anime character, a car or motorbike, a self-portrait of me — anything goes. Expect a quality level similar to what I draw during participatory drawing streams.

Synced Jumyou
¥14,000 / Lower tier perks + Scriptable message video

¥14,000 / month
Scriptable Message Video

You can specify the exact words you want me to say……🤍 Prepare a script, or just send a situation and I'll work hard on writing one! Length is negotiable — I'll do my best to fulfil it. Don't be shy! Send your script via X or Discord after joining.

※If the script contains anything I can't do, I may ask you to revise it. Don't send anything too embarrassing. Well, actually, go ahead and try? Fortune favours the bold...!

Asobu's Wonderful Gentleman Jumyou 🤍
¥68,000 / An overwhelming display of status

¥68,000 / month
Showing off to other viewers 🤍

Let them witness the difference in class!

♡ ♡ ♡
御手洗 遊
Mitarai Asobu

notice.bodyHtml:
Guideline
Rules for enjoying things comfortably
♡ ♡ ♡
👶
Background / Appearance
Mama / Papa / Live2D Model Credits

Here are the people known as "Mama" and "Papa" in Vtuber terms!

・Mama (Illustration)

This is a collaborative work between me and my friend. My friend handled most of the creation. I'm so happy to have such a wonderful appearance and friend! My friend is not currently active as an illustrator. Please refrain from contacting my friend through me.

・Papa (Modeling)

I handled the Live2D modeling myself.

¥
About Financial Support
Notes regarding refunds

Regarding all financial support including tips, goods purchases, and similar transactions,
we do not offer refunds, and we are unable to respond to such inquiries.

Please make sure you are making an informed decision before supporting.

!
About Official Images and Fan Art
Logo / Official images / Fan art / Common rules

【About Logos】

Using official logos in fan works is prohibited.
This is because it can become unclear what is official.

【Official Images】

⭕ Setting as a phone or PC wallpaper
⭕ Using as an SNS header
⭕ Copying the image as fan art of Mitarai Asobu

❌ Using as an SNS icon, etc.
❌ Reposting

Using images as icons or headers is equivalent to re-uploading official images to the internet.
This is uniformly prohibited.

【Fan Art Images】

⭕ Using as an SNS icon

❌ Claiming it is official
❌ Using fan art that looks extremely similar to official images as an icon
(Please avoid anything that could be mistaken for official content.)

【Regarding All Images】

Using a profile associated with Mitarai Asobu to post about topics generally considered inappropriate for Vtubers — such as politics or religion — may threaten Mitarai Asobu's brand and is therefore prohibited. Thank you for your cooperation.

🎨
About Paid Illustration Commissions
Skeb, etc. / Posting OK / Reference images

It is OK to commission an illustrator via Skeb or similar services to draw an illustration of Mitarai Asobu!

Posting it on SNS is also OK, but please read the "About Official Images and Fan Art" section above carefully.

When posting, please use the tag #御手洗みたら？ — I'd love to see it 🤍

Please share this site's URL with the illustrator you commission. The following images should be helpful.

I'm sorry a full character reference sheet isn't ready yet 💦

The images below are reference materials for illustrators. Please do not use them for other purposes.

▶
About Official Videos
No falsified clips

Please do not create or post clip videos that have been altered to appear different from the intended content of the original.

📰
About Media Coverage
Aggregators / Info sites / News accounts, etc.

Regarding news sites, news accounts, Vtuber information sites, and similar posts:

Please refrain from featuring my activities on news or aggregator sites.

Whether the news is positive or negative, I do not wish for my activities or information to spread beyond the scope that I can be involved in.

I ask that fans make a point not to view or share such posts.

🤖
Stream Assets / AI Usage
Thumbnails / Logo / Goods policy

In my activities, I use AI for things like stream overlays, props, wonCommerce plugins, emergency logos, and emergency announcement illustrations. AI is also used for design and for improving the resolution and quality of the Live2D model.

・Thumbnail Illustrations

I use AI illustrations from tools like ChatGPT, Gemini, PixAI, etc., with additional edits made on top.

・Images for Direct Commercial Use (e.g., goods images)

For images used directly for sales such as merchandise, I only use Mitarai Asobu's hand-drawn illustrations or illustrations commissioned and created by an illustrator.

AI-generated or AI-edited images are not used for goods sold directly.

♡ ♡ ♡
御手洗 遊
Mitarai Asobu

crowdfunding.missionTitle: Get a soundproof room and stop the screaming!
crowdfunding.bodyHtml:
Crowdfunding
I'd be so happy if you could support me as much as you're comfortable with.
♡ ♡ ♡
Get a soundproof room and stop the screaming!
Goal: ¥200,000 ／ Deadline: No deadline
Ongoing
caluclating... raised!
Supporters: 14
For contributions of ¥10,000 or more Here's what you'll get 🤍
Special Title
Exclusive Badge
A badge appears on your stream comments ♡
Exclusive Stream
Exclusive Stream
The archive will be saved too!
🔊
Why I Need a Soundproof Room
Purpose / Current challenges / Impact on streaming

Getting a soundproof room is purely about "expanding what I can do in streams." It's not something I need to stream at all, so there's no deadline. I want to take my time collecting funds!

I think I may have aimed a little too high...
so no rush — I'd love for you to support me while having fun～

Purpose

  • Makes it easier to stream at night
  • Makes singing streams and recording easier
  • I can be loud during games without worry
  • Consideration for neighbors

Viewers often comment that my voice is loud (in a fun way), but it really is loud. My regular speaking voice is apparently quite loud too — it's because I speak louder than normal to get a good microphone input level. Even with windows and curtains closed, my voice can be heard by neighbors.

I can also hear sounds from neighboring homes — babies crying, adults laughing, TV sounds, doors, chairs, and so on — all coming into my room. I'm a little worried about those sounds getting picked up in streams, and if I lower the mic sensitivity, my own voice becomes harder to hear.

Currently, my evening live streams run from 8–10 PM, but if I get a soundproof room, I'd like to add streams later in the evening past 10 PM. A survey showed that the most popular viewing time among viewers is 9–11 PM. I want to stream at various times and try different content without worrying about the impact on those around me.

⋈ You will support me... right? 🖤
PP
PayPay
One-tap support
0% fee
➡
AM
Support with Amazon Gift Card
Recipient email: mitaraiasobu@gmail.com
0% fee　※ amazon.co.jp only
➡
FC
Fan Club
Recurring support (with perks)
10% fee
※ The ¥9,999 plan counts as ¥10,000
➡
BO
BOOTH Goods Purchase
You can support by adding a BOOST to your purchase
10% fee
➡
YT
YouTube Super Chat / Membership
30%+ fee　Web version recommended 🤍
➡
DM
Bank Transfer
I'll send account details via X DM
0% fee (transfer fee only)
DM
💡 Note on YouTube support
The app version may charge over 50% in fees. We recommend supporting via the web version!
※ For Amazon Gift Cards, please select "Email type" and
set the recipient email to mitaraiasobu@gmail.com.
※ Only gift cards issued on amazon.co.jp are accepted.
♡ ♡ ♡
御手洗 遊
Mitarai Asobu

contest.bodyHtml:
Coloring Contest
Coordinate the school uniform!
⬇️ Download blank coloring image ⬇️ Download PSD
※ If not needed, you can hide this with the ✕ in the top right
⏳ Loading images...
❌ Some images failed to load
    📊 Image load status:
    👀 View everyone's works
    Picking color from canvas... click again to cancel
    💾 My Palette
    🎨 Color Palette
    🎨 Pick a color
    💾 My Palette
    📚 Layers
    🎨 Coloring contest deadline: one week after reaching 3,000 subscribers
    📖 How to Use
    1. Click/drag in the color square area to pick a color (horizontal = saturation, vertical = brightness)
    2. Use the rainbow bar (hue) to select a color family, then adjust brightness and saturation in the square. When you're happy, click "➕ Save" to add it to your palette
    3. Select a layer to color from the layer panel (Layer 1 is locked and cannot be changed)
    4. Click the "Paint selected layer" button
    5. Use the 👁️ icon to toggle layer visibility
    6. When done, click "Download image" or "Post to Twitter"
    Check out other events too
    Deadline: February 28th
    🏆 Illustration Contest Results
    Congratulations to all winners!
    🤍 Full-Body Award
    ミードリ
    Facing forward with big bright eyes — perfect for thumbnails! 🤍
    🖤 Mini Character Award
    るぇるん
    A small and cute illustration that works great as a one-point accent!
    ⭐ Special Award
    おれお
    A meme-style image riding the latest trend — perfect for Shorts and funny posts!
    100%
